issues.title: No drill-down from KPI to underlying records
issues.description: KPI cards show aggregated numbers (Total Crimes: 57,931) but clicking them does nothing. A data analyst needs to see the underlying breakdown.
issues.expected: Clicking KPI shows a modal or navigates to a filtered view of the underlying data
issues.actual: No click handler; KPI cards are static display-only

issues.title: Timeseries chart lacks granularity toggle
issues.description: Daily granularity is hardcoded. A data analyst may want weekly or monthly aggregation to see longer-term trends.
issues.expected: Toggle button to switch between daily/weekly/monthly view

issues.title: No data export capability
issues.description: No way to export chart data as CSV/JSON. Data analysts need to pull numbers into spreadsheets for reports.
issues.expected: Export button or context menu option to download data
issues.actual: No export functionality anywhere on the page

issues.title: Offense bar chart truncates long type names
issues.description: Crime types longer than 18 characters are truncated with '...'. The full name is only shown in tooltip on hover.
issues.expected: Full type name visible without hover

summary: Dashboard shows correct aggregate numbers but lacks drill-down, export, and granularity controls needed for serious analysis.
